sources_exist.note: All seven canonical HTTP(S) citation occurrences resolve to identifiable pages, although the cited MHI page exposes only a shell rather than the claimed figures.

figures_match_sources.note: None of the seven citations supports its exact NAICS 541614 score input in context. Client/operator adoption is substituted for consultant-firm adoption; broad transport M&A and consulting valuations are substituted for exact-industry evidence; and one freight-audit vendor is generalized into an industry billing mix.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: The declared fractions are bounded and their qualitative direction is plausible, but the 47.27% tail composition is hypothetical and dominates V. t50_years=4 rests on unverified client-side adoption figures and an analog source that gives no 8-10 year milestone. pi_dist and pi_moat are LOW-quality judgments built on uncited or non-comparable sources.

rubric_consistent.note: Identity and all supplied non-null dataset inputs match exactly, and formulas follow the frozen rubric. However, B/M evidence violates the exact-industry boundary discipline: transportation operators, broad consulting and broad middle-market deals do not establish consolidator or multiple inputs for logistics consulting. ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on B, M, S is reviewed and is not independently disqualifying because Stage 4 found the deltas within tolerance.

cross_checks_honest.note: The mandatory checks are present and acknowledge heterogeneity, but the no-proxy check calls A MHI-derived despite the operator/consultant population mismatch. The pricing check repeats unsupported 55-60%/15%/25-30% shares, and the terminal conclusion assumes an unspecified implementation revenue floor without evidence of its share in 541614.

source_audits.note: Lincoln discusses freight forwarding, contract logistics, road transport and logistics assets, with PE pursuing operator bolt-ons. It does not identify four PE-backed platforms adding pure NAICS 541614 consulting firms or the cited Accenture/Grant Thornton consulting deals.

First Page Sage reports 9.9x for $1-3 million EBITDA management consulting, not 5.5x. It provides no logistics-consulting category, SDE normalization, owner-dependence adjustment or transaction evidence supporting the run's estimate.

The accessible MHI page exposes navigation and a report landing shell but not the quoted 28% current/82% five-year figures. Even if those operator figures were available, they would measure supply-chain leaders rather than material adoption by U.S. logistics-consulting firms.

Capstone reports a 9.8x average across 2025 middle-market M&A and 6.8x/9.8x expected typical/premium 2026 multiples. It does not contain the quoted 7.2-7.5x sponsored or 7.4x business-services figures and does not support 8.5x for $10 million-plus EBITDA logistics-consulting platforms.

First Analysis says supply-chain technology adoption tends to lag other sectors and cites only 10% of 200 retail/wholesale operators with live AI workflows. It provides no dated cloud endpoints or 8-10 year time-to-50% analog for supply-chain consultants.

Gallup supports 52.3% of employer-businesses owned by people 55+ and shows general long-term-plan gaps. It does not report Boomers as 37% of owners or an age-60-plus share for 541614, and its 27% close-or-unsure figure is general rather than a logistics-consulting buyer shortage.

SSI says its own automated freight-audit service charges a contingency fee based on recoverable refunds. It does not show that contingency pricing is standard across 541614, quantify a 15% industry share, or support the stated T&M/fixed and retainer shares.

reasons: At inputs.current_adoption_pct.url (https://www.mhi.org/content/2/3614611/new-mhi-and-deloitte-report-finds-ai-biggest-disruptor-of-supply-chains-over-the-next-decade), the quoted figures are not accessible and supply-chain operator adoption is treated as logistics-consultant adoption. Supply accessible firm-side material-adoption evidence or a transparent consultant-lag fallback chain.

At inputs.historical_analogs.url (https://www.firstanalysis.com/research/supply-chain-jul-2026/), qualitative cloud lag is turned into an unsupported 8-10 year time-to-50% analog. Re-run t50_years from dated comparable endpoints and corrected current-adoption evidence.

At inputs.ai_replaceable_share.breakdown_by_role[10], 47.27% of the wage bill is assigned a 0.30 fraction from an unevidenced mixture of logisticians, industrial engineers and field staff. Establish the six-digit tail composition and apply separate task fractions before recomputing the input.

At inputs.active_consolidators.url (https://www.lincolninternational.com/perspectives/articles/reset-to-reengagement-transportation-logistics-ma-in-2025-and-why-2026-matters-more/), transportation/logistics operator M&A does not support four platforms buying pure logistics consultancies. Name each PE-backed platform and qualifying recent 541614 add-on.

At inputs.buy_mult.url (https://firstpagesage.com/business/consulting-firm-ebitda-valuation-multiples/) and inputs.exit_mult.url (https://www.capstonepartners.com/insights/report-capstone-partners-middle-market-mergers-and-acquisitions-valuations-index/), broad and conflicting multiple sources are adjusted to 5.5x/8.5x without exact-industry transactions. Supply normalized logistics-consulting target and platform comparables.

At inputs.pricing_structure.url (https://ssui.com/contingency-parcel-freight-invoice-audits/), one freight-audit vendor's model is generalized to an unsupported 55-60% project, 15% gainshare and 25-30% retainer mix. Supply representative 541614 revenue-weighted billing evidence before reassessing pi_dist.

At inputs.owners_60plus_pct.url (https://news.gallup.com/poll/657362/small-business-owners-lack-succession-plan.aspx), a general employer-owner statistic does not establish 37% age 60-plus or a 541614 succession shortage. Use an industry/professional-services proxy with a complete derivation and an applicable shortage finding.

At cross_checks.terminal_value.justification and inputs.pi_moat.rationale, an unspecified physical-implementation revenue slice is used to support PRESSURED despite no evidence of its share in this code. Supply segment-mix and client-insourcing evidence that distinguishes analysis, software implementation, facility work and freight-audit services before reassessing terminal demand.
flags_reviewed: ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on B, M, S
